# HilbertRaum Corporate Contributor License Agreement (v1.0)

This Corporate Contributor License Agreement ("Agreement") is entered into by
the corporation or other legal entity identified below ("Corporation") for
the benefit of the HilbertRaum project (the "Project", including its current
Maintainers and the planned successor entity HilbertRaum FlexCo, as defined
in the Individual CLA).

The Corporation accepts and agrees to the following terms for the present and
future Contributions submitted to the Project by the Corporation's designated
employees listed in Schedule A (which may be updated by e-mail to the
Project).

1. **Definitions.** "Contribution" and "Work" have the meaning given in the
   HilbertRaum Individual CLA v1.0.

2. **Grant of Copyright License.** The Corporation grants to the Project and
   to recipients of software distributed by the Project a perpetual,
   worldwide, non-exclusive, no-charge, royalty-free, irrevocable,
   transferable and sublicensable copyright license to reproduce, prepare
   derivative works of, publicly display, publicly perform, distribute and
   make available the Contributions and such derivative works, including the
   right to license and distribute them under any license terms, including
   open source licenses (such as GNU GPLv3) and commercial or proprietary
   license terms (dual licensing).

3. **Grant of Patent License.** As in Section 3 of the Individual CLA,
   applied to patent claims licensable by the Corporation.

4. **Authority.** The person signing represents that they are authorized to
   enter into this Agreement on behalf of the Corporation. The Corporation
   represents that each designated employee is authorized to submit
   Contributions on its behalf.

5. **Original Work; Notification; Disclaimer.** Sections 5 to 8 of the
   Individual CLA apply mutatis mutandis.

6. **Governing Law.** Austrian law; place of jurisdiction Graz, Austria.
